# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-service-account
    displayName: Application Service Account
- name: app-service-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccountKey
  properties:
    serviceAccountId: $(ref.app-service-account.name)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account
- name: app-service-account-policy
  type: iam.v1.role
  properties:
    role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: app-service-account-binding
  type: iam.v1.binding
  properties:
    role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-account
- name: app-service-account-key-json
  type: runtimeconfig.v1beta1.variable
  properties:
    variable: app-service-account-key-json
    value: $(ref.app-service-key.privateKeyData)
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-service-key
